parityMeta.describes: TrainingDecision V2 productive-floor parity — a 20-day gap drives reentry, which applies ROLE_FLOORS_REENTRY so main/secondary compounds keep a productive minimum of 2 sets and finalVolumeMultiplier stays at the reentry floor (0.65) without double-trimming to near-zero. Locks the historical all-1-set regression as fixed (minTargetSets >= 1, compounds >= 2).
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic AppData. Last session 20 days before the clock (14-27d reentry window). The reentry role floors are the no-all-1-set guarantee the Swift port must preserve.
